properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Move spirit move upon my earth Uncover the face of my deep Move spirit move upon my earth Flutter your wings come in now King of all lights drive away my night Let this new day be realized

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Walk in the light He is the light And you will become the light

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let there be no part dark in me Father take over my soul Let the glory that I once shared with thee long ago Be now awaken in me King of all lights Drive away my night Let this new day be realized

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This is the promise of the day star That had risen in the west Arise and shine thy light has come Arise and shine thy light has come

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Can you see it? (I see it) Do you believe it? (I believe it) Can you accept it? (I accept it) It is yours, (It is mine), It is ours!
